name: place_buy_order
description: Place a buy order to purchase cryptocurrency using a linked payment method. Specify the amount in either the cryptocurrency or your native fiat currency. The order is executed at the current market rate.

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: The ID of the cryptocurrency account to buy into.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: The currency for the amount (e.g., USD for fiat amount, BTC for crypto amount).

parameters.name: payment_method
parameters.description: The ID of the payment method to use.

parameters.name: commit
parameters.description: If false, the buy is not immediately executed (default true).
